file_insights.purpose: Header component with logo, branding, and controls
features: Logo with fallback to first letter

file_insights.purpose: Footer component with restaurant info and legal links
Product card component with add-to-cart functionality

features: Head meta tags and Tailwind CSS
Dark mode support via data-theme attribute

file_insights.purpose: Theme styles with CSS variables and dark mode support
Theme manifest defining configuration and file references

patterns_discovered.description: Components receive data via EJS include with destructured props
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clean separation of concerns and reusability

patterns_discovered.description: All colors use CSS custom properties with dark mode support
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single source of truth for colors; easy dark mode switching

patterns_discovered.description: All text strings use translation function with fallbacks
Interactive features (cart, theme toggle) managed via Alpine.js
Semantic HTML with ARIA labels and proper roles
patterns_discovered.benefit: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance and screen reader support

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of Phosphor icons throughout components
patterns_discovered.benefit: Modern, consistent icon set with accessibility

patterns_discovered.description: Components gracefully handle missing organization data
patterns_discovered.benefit: Robustness and flexibility for different configurations

patterns_discovered.description: Mandatory E-Menum branding and attribution in footer

gotchas_discovered.description: Templates check typeof t === 'function' before calling t()
gotchas_discovered.reason: Translation function may not be available in all contexts
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents runtime errors; provides fallback English text
gotchas_discovered.solution: Always use conditional check: typeof t === 'function' ? t('key') : 'Fallback'

gotchas_discovered.description: Footer must always include E-Menum branding link
gotchas_discovered.solution: Never remove the powered-by E-Menum attribution

gotchas_discovered.description: CSS must not use hardcoded hex values
gotchas_discovered.reason: Breaks dark mode and theme customization
gotchas_discovered.impact: Theme colors won't update properly in dark mode

gotchas_discovered.description: Templates should not contain hardcoded UI text
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot localize theme for different languages
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use t('translation.key') for all user-facing strings

gotchas_discovered.impact: Difficult to tap on mobile; accessibility violation
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use btn classes or add explicit min-width/min-height

gotchas_discovered.description: Decorative images should have empty alt attributes
gotchas_discovered.solution: Use alt='' for icons; descriptive alt for content images

gotchas_discovered.description: Theme toggle saves to localStorage but may not sync with server
gotchas_discovered.reason: Client-side only state; needs server-side preference for consistency
gotchas_discovered.impact: Theme preference could be lost or inconsistent across devices
gotchas_discovered.solution: Consider syncing user theme preference to backend

gotchas_discovered.description: WhatsApp links must have phone number without special characters
gotchas_discovered.impact: Link could be invalid if phone format is incorrect
gotchas_discovered.solution: Strip all non-digit characters before creating WhatsApp link

deliverables: Comprehensive README with quick start guide
Full layout template with Alpine.js integration
CSS stylesheet with variables and dark mode
Theme manifest with all required fields
key_achievements: Documented all best practices and requirements
Implemented dark mode with CSS variables
approach_outcome.documentation_quality: Excellent - includes code examples, DO/DON'T rules, accessibility requirements, and browser support matrix
approach_outcome.code_quality: High - well-commented, semantic HTML, proper icon usage, accessibility features

recommendations.rationale: Help developers debug common issues quickly

recommendations.recommendation: Create theme validator tool or checklist
recommendations.rationale: Ensure all theme submissions meet requirements
Prevent slow theme loading on mobile
Catch common mistakes before theme deployment

recommendations.note: Current colors object in theme.json could support more detailed customization

recommendations.recommendation: Add example for additional common components

recommendations.rationale: Clarify all translation keys used throughout the theme
recommendations.scope: Create reference document mapping keys to usage contexts

recommendations.rationale: Clarify semantic versioning for theme updates
recommendations.guidance: Minor: style changes, Major: breaking layout changes
